title: BOSSES+ MC
description: Minecraft takes you into a beautiful world with a better setting than the original Minecraft, but it also has a dark side, two entities will be watching and stalking you from day one.
body:
Minecraft takes you into a beautiful world with a better setting than the original Minecraft, but it also has a dark side, two entities will be watching and stalking you from day one, the difficulty of passing a world has increased, having to search or craft different eyes to the portal to the end, certain dungeons or structures change and make them more beautiful or complex, the great final battle against the dragon of the end changes and makes it more complicated, and not only are you going to have those bosses, this modpack also adds different bosses or mini bosses, but the ones that stand out the most are the famous whiterstorm and the famous herobrine, thereby adding more excitement to the world, optimization will not be left aside either by adding various optimization mods, and with this you can enjoy a good modpack.
